extracted_fields.root_cause: The root cause was a misconfigured database connection pool parameter introduced during a routine deployment at 09:30 UTC. The `max_connections` parameter was incorrectly set to 10 (down from the production value of 200) in the deployment configuration manifest.
extracted_fields.resolution_summary: Immediate rollback of the Payment API deployment configuration to the previous known-good state (connection pool max_connections = 200). Manual validation of Payment API health endpoints confirmed service recovery.
